patches.hypothesis: The method `getCentralDirectoryLength` erroneously returns the length of the local file data instead of the central directory data length.
The method incorrectly uses `getLocalFileDataLength()` instead of calculating the central directory length, leading to a mismatch in expected values.

The overfitting patch returns a hardcoded value, which bypasses the actual logic necessary to compute the central directory length. The refined fix implements the logic to calculate the length based on the actual contents of data fields relevant to the central directory, ensuring correct information retrieval according to the ZIP file structure standards.
patches.original_hypothesis: The method getCentralDirectoryLength was incorrectly returning the local file data length instead of the central directory data length.
